PensionCategory.pageUsageText: Choose a group and the payment options for each plan
PensionCategory.noteText: Note: Amounts are before tax, and don't include any payments to your beneficiary after you die (if applicable)

electionGroupTableData.electionGroupMoreInfoText: Your contributions to the pension plan and interest earned on those contributions will be paid as a lump sum. For the company benefit, you can choose the form of payment separately.
Your contributions to the pension plan and interest earned on those contributions will be paid as a lump sum. For the company benefit, you can choose the form of payment separately.

popOverContent.popOverContentText: A monthly payment to you only, until you die

popOverContentList.list2: If married, your spouse must consent

popOverContentList.list3: If single, considered standard form of pension payment

FooterNoteText: Note: The Premier Company reserves the right to correct any errors. If it's determined at any time that the information provided on this site conflicts with the benefit defined by the Premier Pension Plan, the Premier Pension Plan will prevail. Under the law, a plan must be operated in accordance with its terms.
expandSectionContentText1:
You may be required to pay Social Security and Medicare taxes on the nonqualified pension payments that are shown on this site. These taxes, which are required by the Internal Revenue Service, are often called FICA (Federal Insurance Contributions Act) taxes. If FICA taxes apply to you, they'll be deducted from your active payroll, if applicable, or your payment. The timing of the withholding may vary.

In addition to FICA taxes, federal and state tax withholding may also apply to your nonqualified pension payment.
expandSectionContentText2:
Your cash balance benefit has been calculated using current interest rates. Your actual cash balance benefit will be converted to the annuity options based on the interest rate in effect on your payment start date. If the interest rate at the time your payment begins is different from the current rate, your annuity options may be higher or lower than the amounts shown on this site.

Your cash balance benefit has been calculated based on:

expandSectionContentTextsub.expandSectionPoint: The value of your account from this plan
Any benefit you accrued from a previous plan

expandSectionContentText3: According to our records, a portion of your benefit may be assigned to an alternate payee due to a Qualified Domestic Relations Order (QDRO). The benefit shown hasn't been adjusted to reflect this QDRO.
quitPopupHeadetText: What do you want to do?
saveContentText: Keep the choices you've made, so far. Finish making pension choices later.
quitContentText: Cancel your pension request and lose all the pension choices you've made, so far.
returnContentText: Go back to the current page without quitting.
